parameters.query: INSERT INTO wms.wms_id_sequences (seq_key, next_val) VALUES ($1, 1) ON CONFLICT (seq_key) DO UPDATE SET next_val = wms.wms_id_sequences.next_val + 1 RETURNING next_val AS seq_num
INSERT INTO wms.wms_documents (company_code, doc_type, doc_number, status, wms_status, warehouse_code, created_by, doc_date, remarks) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'draft', 'pending', $4, $5, CURRENT_DATE, $6)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, doc_number: $('Build Doc Number').first().json.doc_number, message: '单据创建成功' }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE wms.wms_documents SET status = 'completed', wms_status = 'completed' WHERE company_code = $1 AND doc_type = $2 AND doc_number = $3 AND wms_status IN ('pending', 'in_progress')

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: '单据已完成' }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE wms.wms_documents SET status = 'exported', wms_status = 'exported', exported_at = NOW(), export_batch = CONCAT('EXP-', TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI')) WHERE company_code = $1 AND id = ANY(string_to_array($2, ',')::int[]) AND wms_status = 'completed'

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: '已标记为已导出' }) }}
